def negative_counter_most_common_all_items_retrieved_for_top_one():
    rule_id = "counter_most_common_all_items_retrieved_for_top_one"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Counter.most_common() called without an argument and subscripted with [0]; pass n=1 or use max()."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
